title: Complete analysis of workflow:plan, workflow:lite-plan, and issue:plan implementations
context: Need comprehensive documentation of three workflow implementations (workflow:plan, workflow:lite-plan, issue:plan) covering all technical aspects: Slash Command implementation, Skill integration, JSON Schema registration, CCW server interaction, agent development, and other implementation perspectives. This analysis will provide technical foundation for adding new workflows to the project. Must include complete implementation flows with evidence/references for each component. Use all available analysis tools (ace-tool, gemini cli, etc.).
expected_behavior: Complete technical documentation for each workflow covering: 1) Slash Command structure and registration, 2) Skill integration patterns, 3) JSON Schema definitions, 4) CCW server communication protocols, 5) Agent implementation details, 6) File structure and organization, 7) Configuration and routing mechanisms, 8) Error handling and validation, 9) Testing patterns, 10) Integration points with other systems
actual_behavior: Currently missing comprehensive documentation of workflow implementation patterns
